title: AGENT_CONTRACT.md catches up with D022 (cross-check) + D023 (noise markers + id convention)

evidence.ref: AGENT_CONTRACT.md last touched in D021 (688eda6); D022 and D023 landed afterward with substantive rules (ssotdeps cross-check; noise-marker check on raw purpose; 000-/999- fixture id convention) — none reflected in the doc dumb-agent reads first
021-agent-contract-doc-current-with-fixture-rules — same SSOT-mirror-cleanup pattern; D024 is its successor
022-ssotdeps-cross-check — added the cross-check guard mentioned in the new Step-2 note
023-fixture-noise-markers — introduced layer-2 of the four purpose-rule layers and the 000-/999- id convention now documented

examples: After D024: Purpose rules section enumerates 4 layers including the D023 structural noise marker; new 'Fixture id convention' subsection documents 000-/999- split; Step 2 mentions ssotdeps cross-check is CI-enforced.
